message:
fix(vdbe): INSERT OR IGNORE suppresses CHECK and NOT NULL constraint violations

Previously emit_check_constraints always emitted Halt on CHECK failure,
ignoring conflict resolution mode. Now accepts ignore_label parameter;
when OE_IGNORE, CHECK/NOT NULL failures jump past the INSERT instead of
halting. Updated all 6 call sites across INSERT VALUES, INSERT...SELECT,
and UPDATE codegen paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
